3085250.name: Roll Soundtrack
3085250.description:
The music of 'roll' is uniquely created in each game using our team's hand-crafted music-generation system, and assembled in real-time using both the world's seed and the player's actions. While this means that there are near-countless potential songs that exist in the world of 'roll', we wanted to create a list of the ambient soundscapes one may find along their journeys. As such, we've put together a collection of relaxing music that can found in many of the worlds, with each track being generated and recorded in-game, and featuring a range of melodic elements from weather to animals.



Purchasing this soundtrack should be considered as a way to support the developer and artists if you enjoyed the worlds of 'roll', and the profits from these sales will be divided between team equally~♡
